title: AI's BIGGEST Problem: The Adoption Gap Explained! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that the adoption gap is AI's biggest problem, noting that cutting-edge AI systems like agentic systems and LLMs are advancing rapidly while many businesses struggle to integrate them into operations. The widening gap is leaving companies behind.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof frames the adoption gap as AI's biggest problem: capabilities in agentic systems and LLMs are advancing quickly, while many businesses struggle to integrate them into day-to-day operations. The gap matters because it widens as the technology improves faster than organizations can absorb it, leaving slower companies behind. The takeaway is that the bottleneck lies in operational integration rather than in the pace of model progress.
